columns.description: Share of total volume delivered on time
Share of total volume delivered late
Total volume delivered exactly on time (DaysLateEarly = 0)
columns.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN DaysLateEarly = 0 THEN Total ELSE 0 END)

columns.description: Total volume delivered late or early (DaysLateEarly != 0)
columns.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN DaysLateEarly <> 0 THEN Total ELSE Late END)

columns.description: Share of total volume for the current Days Late bucket within the current grouping
columns.expression: TRY_DIVIDE(SUM(`Total`), SUM(`Total`) AGGREGATE OVER (ORDER BY `DaysLateEarly` ALL))

columns.description: Cumulative share of total volume by Days Late within the current grouping
columns.expression: TRY_DIVIDE(SUM(`Total`) AGGREGATE OVER (ORDER BY `DaysLateEarly` CUMULATIVE), SUM(`Total`) AGGREGATE OVER (ORDER BY `DaysLateEarly` ALL))
